title: Code page lands on a wall of prose — components hidden, hard to scan

steps.description: Add wrap_h2_sections_collapsible helper, apply in _render_architecture_html, add chips endpoint in code router, tighten _GROUNDING_TEMPLATE from 2-5 to 1-3 sentences
Review S01: helper correctness (Purpose-only open, content preservation), endpoint shape, prompt edit one-line
Add code_module_chips.html fragment, insert chip strip above prose in code_architecture_view.html, run make css
Review S03: DOM order chips-before-prose, htmx target alignment with cards section, accessibility, no Tailwind dynamic class breakage
Tests for wrap helper, chips endpoint, chips-before-prose DOM order, mapgen prompt-text assertion
Review S05: semantic correctness, falsifiability, regression coverage
Cross-step review — backend helper + frontend insertion + tests compose into a complete fix
QV: Browser verification — chip strip above prose, click → module detail, non-Purpose H2 collapsed by default
